name: crawling_exa
description:
Read a webpage's full content as clean markdown. Use after web_search_exa when highlights are insufficient or to read any URL.

Best for: Extracting full content from known URLs. Batch multiple URLs in one call.
Returns: Clean text content and metadata from the page(s).

urls.description: URLs to read. Batch multiple URLs in one call.

maxCharacters.description: Maximum characters to extract per page (must be a number, default: 3000)

maxAgeHours.description: Maximum age of cached content in hours. 0 = always fetch fresh content, omit = use cached content with fresh fetch fallback.

subpages.description: Number of subpages to also crawl from each URL.

subpageTarget.description: Keywords to prioritize when selecting subpages
